topStory.text: Meta expanded its Hyperion data center in Richland Parish, Louisiana to 5 GW and more than $50 billion — more than doubling the project's scope since its December 2024 groundbreaking and making it the largest single data-center campus announced in the US.

feed.text: A new Fortune analysis finds data centers have already added an estimated $23 billion to Americans' electricity bills, intensifying the who-pays fight as Virginia's first-of-its-kind $0.011/kWh data-center consumption tax took effect July 1.

Meta announced its Hyperion campus in Richland Parish, Louisiana will be expanded to 5 GW and more than $50 billion — up from a $10B estimate at its December 2024 groundbreaking — making it the largest single data-center campus announced in the US, with 2 GW targeted by 2030.

SK hynix rose 13% in its Nasdaq debut, closing at $168.01 after pricing its ADRs at $149 and raising $26.5B — completing the largest-ever US share sale by a foreign company, with proceeds earmarked for fab and HBM capacity expansion.

Google was revealed as the owner of Wyoming's largest data center project — the 2.7 GW 'Project Tembo' campus in Cheyenne, formerly known as Project Jade — adding another multi-gigawatt hyperscale campus to the Mountain West pipeline.

Amazon priced a $25 billion bond offering to finance AI and data center infrastructure, marking one of the largest corporate debt raises of 2026 as hyperscalers increasingly tap debt markets alongside internal cash to fund record capex.

Samsung's preliminary Q2 guidance: a record ~KRW 89.4T (~$58B) operating profit, up ~1,810% year over year on AI memory demand — yet shares closed ~7% lower on concerns the memory upcycle is maturing.

Taiwan's economics ministry approved TSMC's $20B capital injection into TSMC Arizona — the sixth tranche, lifting total cleared US investment to $44B — funding a 12-inch wafer fab and an advanced packaging plant.
Data-center backlash hit Missouri's GOP state-senate primaries, with candidates demanding restrictions in a state that just landed ~$25B of Amazon ($10B, New Florence) and Google ($15B) campuses.
